title.en: Medical device software - Software life cycle processes
title.zh: 医疗器械软件 - 软件生命周期过程

scope.en: Software development lifecycle for medical device software

standards.abstract: Defines the life cycle requirements for medical device software development, including requirements for configuration management and problem resolution.
standards.note: Consolidated version (Edition 1.1). EN version harmonised under EU MDR.

title.en: Medical device software — Software life cycle processes
title.zh: 医疗器械软件 - 软件生命周期过程

scope.en: Software development lifecycle for medical devices

standards.abstract: Defines life cycle requirements for the development of medical device software and software within medical devices. Applicable to the development and maintenance of medical device software.

title.en: Health software — Part 1: General requirements for product safety
title.zh: 健康软件 - 第1部分：产品安全通用要求

standards.abstract: Applies to the safety and security of health software products. Addresses safety requirements for health software that is not part of a medical device.

title.en: Principles for medical device security—Risk management
title.zh: 医疗设备安全的风险管理原则

standards.abstract: Provides guidance on security risk management for medical device manufacturers. Describes a security risk management process aligned with ISO 14971.

title.en: Medical device software — Part 1: Guidance on the application of ISO 14971 to medical device software
title.zh: 医疗器械软件 - 第1部分：IEC 62304应用于制造和维护的指南

standards.abstract: Provides guidance on the application of ISO 14971 to medical device software. Helps manufacturers apply risk management concepts to software development.

title.en: Health software and health IT systems safety, effectiveness and security - Part 5-1: Security - Activities in the product life cycle
title.zh: 健康软件和健康IT系统安全、有效性和保密性 - 第5-1部分：安全 - 产品生命周期中的安全活动

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for security in the development and maintenance lifecycle of health software and health IT systems.
standards.scope: Health software and health IT systems safety, effectiveness and security -- Security -- Activities in the product life cycle.

title.en: Application of risk management for IT-networks incorporating medical devices - Part 2-2: Guidance for the communication of medical device security needs, risks and controls
title.zh: 健康信息基础设施中整合医疗设备的风险管理应用 - 第2-2部分：医疗设备通信安全能力的披露和沟通指南

standards.abstract: Provides guidance on disclosure of security-related capabilities and risks of medical devices on IT-networks.
standards.scope: Application of risk management for IT-networks incorporating medical devices -- Guidance for the communication of medical device security needs, risks and controls.

title.en: Security for industrial automation and control systems - Part 4-1: Secure product development lifecycle requirements
title.zh: 工业通信网络 - 网络和系统安全 - 第4-1部分：安全产品开发生命周期要求

standards.abstract: Specifies process requirements for the secure development lifecycle of products used in industrial automation and control systems.
standards.scope: Security for industrial automation and control systems -- Secure product development lifecycle requirements.

title.en: Health informatics - Device interoperability - Part 10101: Nomenclature
title.zh: 健康信息学 - 设备互操作性 - 第10101部分：命名法

standards.abstract: Defines the nomenclature for health informatics device interoperability, providing codes for medical device data.
standards.scope: Health informatics -- Device interoperability -- Point-of-care medical device communication -- Nomenclature.

title.en: Health informatics - Device interoperability - Part 10207: Domain information and service model for point-of-care medical device communication
title.zh: 健康信息学 - 设备互操作性 - 第10207部分：基于领域信息和服务模型

standards.abstract: Specifies domain information and service models for health informatics device interoperability.
standards.scope: Health informatics -- Personal health device communication -- Domain information model.

title.en: Information technology - Artificial intelligence - Overview of trustworthiness in artificial intelligence
title.zh: 信息技术 - 人工智能 - 人工智能中的偏差概述

standards.abstract: Provides an overview of trustworthiness in artificial intelligence, including reliability, safety and security aspects.
standards.scope: Information technology -- Artificial intelligence -- Overview of trustworthiness in artificial intelligence.

title.en: Information technology - Artificial intelligence - Guidance on risk management
title.zh: 信息技术 - 人工智能 - 风险管理指南

standards.abstract: Provides guidance on managing risks related to the development and use of artificial intelligence.
standards.scope: Information technology -- Artificial intelligence -- Guidance on risk management.
